title: taraxacum lasianthum
intro: Taraxacum lasianthum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as supporting liver function, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing digestion. Taraxacum lasianthum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in salves and creams for topical application.
